steps.title: Identify the required verb tense
steps.content: The sentence describes events from the 1950s. The previous clause uses the simple past verb "advised" to describe Zufall's action. The blank describes another action by Zufall in the same historical timeframe, so it must also use simple past tense.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — suggested: Simple past tense — matches "advised" and correctly places the action in the past. ✓
  • Choice B — suggests: Present tense — does not indicate the action happened in the past. ✗
  • Choice C — had suggested: Past perfect — implies this action happened before "advised," creating an inconsistency with the parallel structure. ✗
  • Choice D — was suggesting: Past progressive — inconsistent with the simple past verb "advised" used for the parallel action. ✗
That matches Choice A — suggested.
